# Per-species live counts captured at the Comact.
# Format: [<SPECIES>] active=<N> available=<N> total=<N>
# Numbers come from the bottom-of-pane counts when the species filter is set.
# Append a real line below at capture time (or delete this file if skipped).
# Example: [TUL] active=25 available=35 total=60

[TUL] active=7 available=17 total=24
